Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of 51% equity share capital of Pavantra Labs Limited (an Indian listed public company) by Reniva Energy Limited; this document is indicative and non-binding except for Confidentiality, Exclusivity, Costs, and Governing Law (India).
Consideration and valuation: INR 3,240,000,000 payable in two tranches (80% at Closing, 20% after 12 months subject to working capital true-up); any reference to share price is UPSI under SEBI (PIT) Regulations until disclosed to stock exchanges.
Confidentiality and UPSI handling: parties shall maintain information barriers per SEBI PIT and internal codes; only designated insiders may access the data room and all emails must use the subject tag “[Pavantra-Reniva–UPSI]”; no employee MAC addresses are collected for monitoring.
Data protection: processing of personal data will comply with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023; consents will be captured for specified purposes and revocable; sensitive identifiers (Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN) will be masked and not retained beyond legal retention norms.
Children’s data: no data of individuals under 18 will be processed for due diligence; if any child data is encountered inadvertently, it will be segregated and deleted with audit logs.
Governance post-closing: Reniva to nominate one director and one observer; proposed nominee is Mr. Raghav Iyer, FCA, who shall chair the Audit Committee and oversee treasury integration.
Linkable identifiers for onboarding the nominee (internal record only): Mr. Raghav K. Iyer (DOB: 1991-04-09, age 33), role: CFO-designate at Pavantra Labs Limited, office: Plot 18, Sector 19, Navi Prana, Maharashtra 410110, device alias: “PAV-CFO-ThinkPad-T14”, email: raghav.iyer@pavantra.example.ltd, PAN: R Y I P I 1 2 3 4 Z, A a d h a a r: 1234 5678 9000 (masked), employee code: PL-EMP-0097, session_ref: sess-rghv-0421-nvp-5f29.
Payment mechanics: Closing tranche to be remitted to escrow at Samrat Bank Ltd., Branch: Central Navi Prana, A/c No.: 0482 77XX 9021, IFSC: SAMR0000521; escrow terms in Annex II.
Conditions precedent: shareholder approval, filings under Indian competition law, stock exchange notifications, no material adverse change (for the avoidance of doubt, generic sector headlines or public-source references do not constitute MAC).
Due diligence access: virtual data room link https://dataroom.example.in/doc/TS-AX19?view=1&gstin=27AAXCP0000Z5&ret=FY25; login assigned to “Raghav-I” only; do not forward; G S T I N shown there is mask-simulated.
Communications: all official correspondence to dealdesk@reniva.example.in and co-sec@pavantra.example.ltd; any WhatsApp or SMS summaries are non-authoritative project-management prose.
Business covenants: ordinary course operations to continue; vendor confirms there is no preferential allotment in the last 6 months and no undisclosed related party transactions.
DPDPA safeguards: purpose limitation statements to be displayed in the data room banner; audit trails will record field-level views (e.g., PAN masked as RYI•••1234Z); device telemetry is limited to browser type and session duration.
Generic demographic note (non-linkable): a compliance trainee aged 22 in Coimbatore uses Android 12 on a Redmi Note device for testing the data room UI; no employer, account, or contact details are associated with this example.
Security context: the last VPN handshake for the CFO-designate profile originated via gateway “gw-nvp-04” (10.6.21.14:443), device nickname “Raghav-iOS-backup”, and URL-embedded token t=af2b_ 9- QP (broken run intentional for OCR validation).
Miscellaneous: this term sheet does not constitute an offer document, prospectus, or profit forecast; brand names “NimbusGrid” and “SunLeaf” mentioned in synergy plans are product codenames and not securities identifiers.
Governing law and dispute resolution: laws of India; courts at Navi Prana, Maharashtra shall have exclusive jurisdiction; any updates regarding price-sensitive events will be released through the stock exchange portals before internal circularisation.
